---
id: create-new-device
title: "Create Device"
description: "Create either an immutable or a mutable device. Immutable devices require chunking parameters and are optimized for long-term, append-only storage. Mutable devices behave like classic devices and do not require chunk settings."
sidebar_label: "Create Device"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/tagoio-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create Device"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/device"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create either an immutable or a mutable device. Immutable devices require chunking parameters and are optimized for long-term, append-only storage. Mutable devices behave like classic devices and do not require chunk settings.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
